_meta.description: Seed catalog: Rocksmith gear type → recommended VST3/AU plugins. Free plugins only. Used by /vst/suggest endpoint and the per-piece VST panel hint.
_meta.notes: v5: add MeldaProduction Free as a second core install — drops Bertom (MTremolo+MVibrato replace it) and upgrades multi-band EQ from 3 → 6 bands (MEqualizer beats kHs 3-Band for the EQ5/EQ8/StudioEQ family). Melda free covers tremolo/vibrato/flanger/phaser/ring-mod/EQ/comp as PRIMARY. KHS stays primary for chorus/limiter/gate/multi-band-comp/wah-filter (Melda's free bundle has no equivalent — its *MB, Turbo*, Vintage* etc. are paid demo and mute periodically). Marvel GEQ is an OPTIONAL third install for users who want true 16-band EQ on EQ5/EQ8.

__free_vst_install_guide._note: Two free installs cover the whole library. Optional third for max EQ fidelity.

essential.name: Kilohearts Essentials
essential.covers: Chorus, Delay, Reverb, Filter/Wah, Limiter, Gate, 3-Band EQ (fallback), Distortion/Drive, Bitcrusher, Pitch Shifter (octavers), Ring Mod (fallback)
essential.install_notes: Each module ships as an individual VST3 (kHs Chorus.vst3, kHs Delay.vst3, etc.) in /Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3 on macOS. After install, Settings → Scan plugins.

essential.name: MeldaProduction Free (MFreeFXBundle)
essential.covers: Tremolo (MTremolo), Vibrato (MVibrato), Flanger (MFlanger), Phaser (MPhaser), Ring Mod (MRingModulator), 6-band EQ (MEqualizer), Compressor (MCompressor)
essential.install_notes: Install the FREE-ONLY bundle, not MCompleteBundle. Premium plugins (anything with *MB / Turbo* / Vintage* / MGuitarArchitect / MLimiterX etc.) run in demo mode with PERIODIC AUDIO MUTING — unusable for song playback. The catalog only ever points to verified-free plugins.

optional_for_eq_fidelity.name: Voxengo Marvel GEQ
optional_for_eq_fidelity.covers: Pedal_EQ5 + Pedal_EQ8 + Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8 — 16-band linear-phase graphic EQ. Lossless mapping vs MEqualizer's 6-band (which loses 2 of 8 for EQ8).
optional_for_eq_fidelity.install_notes: Free, no registration. VST3 + AU on macOS/Windows.

optional_for_eq_fidelity.name: TDR Nova
optional_for_eq_fidelity.covers: Rack_StudioEQ (4-band parametric, 154 songs in the test library). MEqualizer also fits — Nova is just a cleaner musical match.

Pedal_AcousticEmulator.name: AcousticSimulator
Pedal_AcousticEmulator.notes: Bundled acoustic simulator based on the local blue-button acoustic pedal schematic, using Rocksmith's Tone, MidShift, Body, and Mid knobs.

Pedal_Chorus.name: Chorus
Pedal_Chorus.notes: Bundled Boss CE-2 style BBD chorus based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_Chorus20.name: Chorus20
Pedal_Chorus20.notes: Bundled stereo BBD chorus/flanger based on the local Chorus 2.0 schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_DigitalChorus.name: DigitalChorus
Pedal_DigitalChorus.notes: Bundled clean digital chorus based on the local digital chorus schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, LoFilter, HiFilter, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_DigitalChorus.name: kHs Chorus
Pedal_DigitalChorus.notes: Pair with kHs Filter for the HiFilter/LoFilter controls

Pedal_VintageChorus.name: AnalogChorus
Pedal_VintageChorus.notes: Bundled warm analog stereo BBD chorus based on the local analog chorus schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Bass_Pedal_BassChorus.name: BassChorus
Bass_Pedal_BassChorus.notes: Bundled Boss CEB-3 model — BBD chorus with the bass Low Filter (keeps lows dry). Rate/Depth/LoFilter/Mix map 1:1 to RS.

Pedal_Flanger.name: MFlanger
Pedal_Flanger.notes: Rate, Depth, Feedback, Dry/Wet — Melda free

Pedal_80sFlanger.name: EightiesFlanger
Pedal_80sFlanger.notes: Bundled MXR Flanger Original/SAD1024 style BBD flanger based on the local 80s flanger schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_ClassicFlanger.name: ClassicFlanger
Pedal_ClassicFlanger.notes: Bundled Boss BF-2/MN3207 style BBD flanger based on the local classic flanger schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_ModernFlanger.name: ModernFlanger
Pedal_ModernFlanger.notes: Bundled MF-108M/Cluster Flux style BBD flanger based on the local modern flange schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, Regen, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_VintageFlanger.name: VintageFlanger
Pedal_VintageFlanger.notes: Bundled Deluxe Electric Mistress style BBD flanger based on the local vintage flanger schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Bass_Pedal_BassFlanger.name: BassFlanger
Bass_Pedal_BassFlanger.notes: Bundled Boss BF-2/BF-3 model adapted for bass — modulated delay + feedback (Filter=resonance), lows kept clean. Rate/Depth/Filter/Mix map 1:1.

Pedal_Phaser.name: Phaser363
Pedal_Phaser.notes: Bundled MXR Phase 90 style four-stage phaser based on the local Phaser 363 schematic, using Rocksmith's single Rate knob.

Pedal_Phaser.name: MPhaser
Pedal_Phaser.notes: Rate, Depth, Feedback, Stages, Dry/Wet — Melda free

Pedal_ShaverPhaser.name: ShaverPhaser
Pedal_ShaverPhaser.notes: Bundled ET-25B style phaser based on the local shaver phaser schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate and Depth knobs with fixed internal mix.

Pedal_PlanePhase.name: PlanePhase
Pedal_PlanePhase.notes: Bundled AP-7 style eight-stage phaser based on the local Plane Phase schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Bass_Pedal_BassPhase.name: BassPhase
Bass_Pedal_BassPhase.notes: Bundled analog bass phaser — 4 swept all-pass stages with regeneration, dry/wet notch blend, and a wet-path high-pass so bass lows stay solid. Maps RS Rate/Depth/Mix/Filter.

Pedal_Tremolo.name: Tremolo
Pedal_Tremolo.notes: Bundled Colorsound Tremolo/Tremola style transistor tremolo based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Speed and Mix knobs.

Pedal_Tremolo.name: MTremolo
Pedal_Tremolo.notes: Rate, Depth, Dry/Wet — Melda free, multi-shape

Pedal_AmpTrem.name: AmpTrem
Pedal_AmpTrem.notes: Bundled Demeter Tremulator-style optical amp tremolo based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Speed and Depth knobs.

Pedal_AmpTrem.name: MTremolo
Pedal_AmpTrem.notes: Sine shape = vintage Fender amp tremolo

Pedal_MultiTrem.name: MultiTrem
Pedal_MultiTrem.notes: Bundled Boss TR-2 style multi-wave tremolo based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Speed, Mix, and Waveform knobs.

Pedal_TremOle.name: TremOle
Pedal_TremOle.notes: Bundled envelope-aware stereo tremolo using Rocksmith's Sens, Attack, Release, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_AmpVibe.name: AmpVibe
Pedal_AmpVibe.notes: Bundled Uni-Vibe style four-stage phase modulation based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Speed and Mix knobs.

Pedal_AmpVibe.name: MVibrato
Pedal_AmpVibe.notes: Rate, Depth, Dry/Wet — true vibrato (pitch-mod) not trem

Pedal_MultiVibe.name: MultiVibe
Pedal_MultiVibe.notes: Bundled Boss VB-2 style BBD vibrato based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Speed, Mix and Waveform knobs.

Pedal_AutoVibe.name: AutoVibe
Pedal_AutoVibe.notes: Bundled envelope-controlled vibrato/vibe using Rocksmith's Sens, Attack, Release, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_BassEmulator.name: BassEmulator
Pedal_BassEmulator.notes: Bundled guitar-to-bass octave emulator using Rocksmith's Body and Tone knobs.

Pedal_MarshallSupervibe.name: MarshallSupervibe
Pedal_MarshallSupervibe.notes: Bundled Marshall SV-1/Supervibe style MN3007 BBD vibe based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, Mix and Wave knobs.

Pedal_BakedRotatoe.name: BakedRotatoe
Pedal_BakedRotatoe.notes: Bundled Leslie/RT-20 style rotary speaker based on the local LERA Leslie rotor adapter reference, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, Mix and Balance knobs.

Pedal_BakedRotatoe.name: kHs Chorus
Pedal_BakedRotatoe.notes: Rotary speaker → wide stereo chorus approximation

Pedal_OmniMod.name: OmniMod
Pedal_OmniMod.notes: Bundled Uni-Vibe/Shin-ei style photocell phase modulation based on the local Omni Mod schematics, using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_OmniMod.name: kHs Chorus
Pedal_OmniMod.notes: Generic modulation; chorus covers most use cases

Pedal_AnalogueDelay.name: AnalogDelay
Pedal_AnalogueDelay.notes: Bundled MF-104 style BBD delay using Rocksmith Time, Feedback and Mix controls

Pedal_ValveEcho.name: ValveEcho
Pedal_ValveEcho.notes: Bundled Binson Echorec style valve drum echo using Rocksmith Time, Feedback and Mix controls

Pedal_NPNDelay.name: NpnDelay
Pedal_NPNDelay.notes: Bundled DM-2 style BBD/NPN delay using Rocksmith Time, Feedback and Mix controls

Pedal_NoFiEcho.name: NoFiEcho
Pedal_NoFiEcho.notes: Bundled DE7-style stereo no-fi echo using Rocksmith Time, Feedback and Mix controls

Pedal_OilCanEcho.name: OilCanEcho
Pedal_OilCanEcho.notes: Bundled Tel-Ray / OK Pacemaker oil-can echo based on the local schematics, using Rocksmith's Time, Feedback, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_OilCanEcho.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_OilCanEcho.notes: Short time + high feedback for oil-can wobble

Pedal_CosmicEcho.name: CosmicEcho
Pedal_CosmicEcho.notes: Bundled Synthrotek ECHO / PT2399-style cosmic delay based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Time, Feedback, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_CosmicEcho.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_CosmicEcho.notes: Long times, high feedback for ambient

Pedal_ModDelay.name: ModDelay
Pedal_ModDelay.notes: Bundled DLL10/DML10-style modulated delay using Rocksmith's Time, Feedback, Mix, Rate, and Depth knobs.

Pedal_ModDelay.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_ModDelay.notes: Use chorus after delay for modulation. KHS Delay alone doesn't modulate

Bass_Pedal_BassFilterDelay.name: BassFilterDelay
Bass_Pedal_BassFilterDelay.notes: Bundled Boss DM-2 analog (BBD) delay — warm repeats that darken cumulatively via a feedback-loop low-pass + gentle saturation. Maps RS Time/Feedback/Mix/Filter.

Bass_Pedal_BassFilterEcho.name: BassFilterEcho
Bass_Pedal_BassFilterEcho.notes: Bundled vintage tape echo — same engine as the Filter Delay but voiced like tape: darker, more saturated repeats with wow & flutter. Maps RS Time/Feedback/Mix/Filter.

Bass_Pedal_BassFilterEcho.name: kHs Delay
Bass_Pedal_BassFilterEcho.notes: Tape-echo flavour: narrow Lowcut/Highcut + a touch of modulation

Pedal_SpringReverb.name: SpringReverb
Pedal_SpringReverb.notes: Bundled Holy Grail-style spring tank reverb using Rocksmith's Time, Mix, and Depth knobs.

Pedal_SpringReverb.name: kHs Reverb
Pedal_SpringReverb.notes: Size, Damping, Predelay, Dry/Wet — small size + high damping = spring vibe

Pedal_DigitalVerb.name: DigitalVerb
Pedal_DigitalVerb.notes: Bundled Boss RV-2 style early digital reverb based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Time, Mix, Depth, and Tone knobs.

Pedal_PlateVerb.name: PlateVerb
Pedal_PlateVerb.notes: Bundled EMT 140-style plate reverb based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Time, Depth, Mix, and Voice knobs.

Pedal_TubeSpring.name: TubeSpring
Pedal_TubeSpring.notes: Bundled tube/spring tank reverb based on the local spring driver schematic, using Rocksmith's Mix and Depth knobs.

Pedal_TubeSpring.name: kHs Reverb
Pedal_TubeSpring.notes: Small size + add kHs Distortion for the tube saturation

Pedal_Compression.name: DynamicsCompression
Pedal_Compression.notes: Bundled Dyna Comp-style pedal compressor using Rocksmith's Comp, Attack, and Release knobs.

Pedal_Compression.name: MCompressor
Pedal_Compression.notes: Threshold, Ratio, Attack, Release, Knee, Output Gain, Dry/Wet — Melda free

Bass_Pedal_MBComp.name: BassMultiComp
Bass_Pedal_MBComp.notes: Bundled EBS MultiComp-style multiband bass compressor based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Compress, Filter, and Rate knobs.

Bass_Pedal_MBComp.name: kHs Compressor
Bass_Pedal_MBComp.notes: Fallback: single-band compressor, loses the multiband Filter behavior.

Bass_Pedal_MBComp.name: MCompressor
Bass_Pedal_MBComp.notes: Single-band fallback — Melda free MDynamicsMB doesn't exist in the free bundle; true multiband needs paid MDynamicsMB

Pedal_EQ5.name: EQ5
Pedal_EQ5.notes: Bundled 5-band graphic EQ, Mesa Boogie 5-band model, RS bands

Pedal_EQ5.name: MEqualizer
Pedal_EQ5.notes: 6-band parametric (Melda free). Fits all 5 RS bands losslessly — curator sets Band 1-5 Frequency to RS freqs (63/250/750/2200/5700 Hz)

Pedal_EQ8.name: EQ8
Pedal_EQ8.notes: Bundled 8-band graphic EQ clone of Rocksmith EQ8

Pedal_EQ8.name: MEqualizer
Pedal_EQ8.notes: 6-band parametric — fits 6 of 8 RS bands (loses 2). Better than kHs 3-Band. Install Marvel GEQ if you want all 8.

Pedal_AmpEQ.name: Amp EQ
Pedal_AmpEQ.notes: Bundled Fender '59 Bassman 5F6-A passive FMV tone stack (Yeh & Smith DAFx-06 model). Bass/Mid/Treble interact with the real mid scoop; BassFreq/MidShift/TrebleFreq scale the tone-stack caps.

Pedal_AmpEQ.name: MEqualizer
Pedal_AmpEQ.notes: 3 bands suffice for Bass/Mid/Treble tone stack — use Band 1-3

Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.name: Bass EQ8
Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.notes: Bundled 8-band bass graphic EQ, Boss GE-7B gyrator model, RS bands

Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.name: MEqualizer
Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.notes: 6 of 8 RS bands; curator sets Band 1-6 Frequency to RS freqs (e.g. 75/185/460/1100/2700/6800 Hz)

Rack_StudioCompressor.name: Studio Comp
Rack_StudioCompressor.notes: Bundled dbx 160 model — true-RMS feed-forward VCA compressor (dbx 202 RMS detector + log VCA, OverEasy soft knee). Threshold/Ratio/Attack/Release map 1:1 to RS.

Rack_StudioCompressor.name: MCompressor
Rack_StudioCompressor.notes: Threshold (dB direct), Ratio, Attack (ms), Release (ms) — RS values match MCompressor units 1:1. 40 songs use this rack.

Rack_StudioEQ.name: MEqualizer
Rack_StudioEQ.notes: 6-band parametric — fits all 4 RS bands with Q + Freq from MEqualizer's own Band N Q / Band N Frequency knobs. Most-used EQ (154 songs).

Rack_StudioEQ.name: TDR Nova
Rack_StudioEQ.notes: 4-band parametric (dynamic) — direct 1:1 fit if you prefer Nova's musical voicing

Rack_StudioGraphicEQ.name: Studio Graphic EQ
Rack_StudioGraphicEQ.notes: Bundled 5-band sweepable EQ, API-550 proportional-Q style

Pedal_NoiseGate.name: NoiseGate
Pedal_NoiseGate.notes: Bundled ET-45C/default-gate style gate using Rocksmith's Thresh and Rate knobs

Pedal_NoiseGate.name: kHs Gate
Pedal_NoiseGate.notes: Threshold, Attack, Release, Hold, Range — dedicated gate module

Pedal_Limiter.name: Limiter
Pedal_Limiter.notes: Bundled two-knob stereo peak limiter using Rocksmith's Limit and Rate controls

Pedal_USWah.name: USWah
Pedal_USWah.notes: Bundled Dunlop Cry Baby GCB-95 style wah based on the local US Wah schematic, using Rocksmith's Auto, Pedal, Sens, and Speed knobs.

Pedal_USWah.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_USWah.notes: Cutoff + Resonance; envelope follower in kHs Resonator if needed

Pedal_UKWah.name: UKWah
Pedal_UKWah.notes: Bundled Vox V847 / Clyde McCoy style wah based on the local UK Wah schematic, using Rocksmith's Auto, Pedal, Sens, and Speed knobs.

Bass_Pedal_BassWah.name: BassWah
Bass_Pedal_BassWah.notes: Bundled Cry Baby Bass Wah (105Q) model — resonant band-pass swept across 100 Hz-1.6 kHz by Pedal position, the input envelope (Sens) and an LFO (Speed) when Auto is on, with a little dry blend to keep bass body. Maps RS Auto/Pedal/Sens/Speed.

Pedal_ModernWah.name: ModernWah
Pedal_ModernWah.notes: Bundled Morley Bad Horsie / optical contour wah based on the local Modern Wah schematic, using Rocksmith's Auto, Pedal, Sens, and Speed knobs.

Pedal_ModernWah.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_ModernWah.notes: Resonant LPF behaves as a wah

Pedal_LoFiFilter.name: LoFiFilter
Pedal_LoFiFilter.notes: Bundled Lofinator-style lo-fi filter based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's FilterType and Mix knobs.

Pedal_LoFiFilter.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_LoFiFilter.notes: Pair with kHs Bitcrush for proper lo-fi

Pedal_BobFilter.name: BobFilter
Pedal_BobFilter.notes: Bundled Moog/MuRF-style analog filter based on the local MF-105 schematic, using Rocksmith's Sens, Attack, Release, Mix, and Filter knobs.

Pedal_BobFilter.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_BobFilter.notes: Fallback single-filter sweep if the bundled BobFilter is unavailable

Pedal_AutoFilter.name: AutoFilter
Pedal_AutoFilter.notes: Bundled Mu-Tron III style envelope filter based on the local Auto Filter schematic, using Rocksmith's FilterType, Res, Sens, Attack and Release knobs.

Pedal_AutoFilter.name: AutoSweep
Pedal_AutoFilter.notes: Bundled envelope filter / auto-wah (ships in vst/Qtrix.vst3). Real envelope follower -> biquad sweep, no separate install.

Bass_Pedal_BassAutoFilter.name: AutoSweep
Bass_Pedal_BassAutoFilter.notes: Bundled Q-Tron-style envelope filter kept for Rocksmith Bass Auto Filter/Bass Auto Tone, with bass-range sweep calibration; guitar Auto Tone uses the Mu-Tron III clone.

Pedal_GermaniumDrive.name: GermaniumDrive
Pedal_GermaniumDrive.notes: Bundled two-knob smooth germanium overdrive for Rocksmith's Gain/Tone pedal.

Pedal_GermaniumDrive.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_GermaniumDrive.notes: Fallback: Drive + Bias + Type when bundled GermaniumDrive is unavailable.

Pedal_CustomDrive.name: CustomDrive
Pedal_CustomDrive.notes: Bundled MOSFET/diode custom overdrive based on the local Custom Drive schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Tone, and Voice knobs.

Pedal_CustomDrive.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_CustomDrive.notes: Fallback: tweak Drive + Type when bundled CustomDrive is unavailable.

Pedal_LineDrive.name: LineDrive
Pedal_LineDrive.notes: Bundled Boss OS-2 style drive/distortion blend using Rocksmith Gain and Tone controls

Pedal_MarshallGuvnorPlus.name: MarshallGuvnorPlus
Pedal_MarshallGuvnorPlus.notes: Bundled Marshall GV-2 Guv'nor Plus style drive using Rocksmith Gain, Bass, Mid, Treble and Deep controls

Pedal_SuperDrive.name: SuperDrive
Pedal_SuperDrive.notes: Bundled Boss SD-1 style asymmetric feedback overdrive using Rocksmith Gain and Tone controls

Pedal_RangeBooster.name: RangeBooster
Pedal_RangeBooster.notes: Bundled Rangemaster-style treble booster based on the local OC44 Range Booster schematic, using Rocksmith's Boost knob.

Pedal_RangeBooster.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_RangeBooster.notes: Fallback: Drive at minimum plus high-pass EQ for a treble boost approximation.

Pedal_Distortion.name: StandardDistortion
Pedal_Distortion.notes: Bundled Boss DS-1 style standard distortion using Rocksmith Gain and Tone controls

Pedal_VintageDistortion.name: VintageDistortion
Pedal_VintageDistortion.notes: Bundled DOD 250 style op-amp/asymmetric diode distortion using Rocksmith Gain and Tone controls

Pedal_MetalDistortion.name: AlloyDistortion
Pedal_MetalDistortion.notes: Bundled Boss HM-2 style alloy/heavy metal distortion using Rocksmith Gain and Tone controls

Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.name: BassDistortion
Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.notes: Bundled Pro Co RAT model — LM308 high-gain + hard silicon clip + the RAT passive Filter low-pass. Gain(Distortion)/Tone(pre-clip)/Filter(RAT Filter) map 1:1 to RS.

Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.name: kHs Distortion
Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.notes: Use Mix knob to blend dry bass back in

Bass_Pedal_BassOverdrive.name: BassOverdrive
Bass_Pedal_BassOverdrive.notes: Bundled Darkglass Microtubes B3K model — clean+CMOS-clip parallel paths. Blend/Gain(Drive)/Filter(Grunt)/Tone(Attack) map 1:1 to RS.

Pedal_FuzzWasHe.name: BZ-1
Pedal_FuzzWasHe.notes: Bundled two-knob Chief-style silicon fuzz based on the local schematic.

Pedal_FuzzWasHe.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_FuzzWasHe.notes: Fallback: generic fuzz character when bundled BZ-1 is unavailable.

Pedal_CaptFuzzle.name: Buzz-Tone
Pedal_CaptFuzzle.notes: Bundled two-knob low-headroom germanium fuzz inspired by a vintage fuzz-tone circuit.

Pedal_CaptFuzzle.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_CaptFuzzle.notes: Fallback: generic fuzz character when bundled Buzz-Tone is unavailable.

Pedal_BuzzOne.name: Super-Buzz
Pedal_BuzzOne.notes: Bundled octave fuzz based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain and Tone knobs.

Pedal_BuzzToo.name: Big Buzz
Pedal_BuzzToo.notes: Bundled triangle-era four-transistor fuzz based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain and Tone knobs.

Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.name: BassFuzz
Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.notes: Bundled EHX Bass Big Muff Pi model — 2-stage diode-clip fuzz + Big Muff tone stack + clean low-end blend. Gain/Tone/Filter map 1:1 to RS.

Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.name: kHs Distortion
Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.notes: Fuzz Face module with Mix to blend dry

Pedal_OctaveUp.name: OctaveUp
Pedal_OctaveUp.notes: Bundled clean +12 octave-up inspired by Foxrox Octron and EQD Tentacle two-path octave references, using Rocksmith's Tone and Mix knobs.

Pedal_OctaveUp.name: kHs Pitch Shifter
Pedal_OctaveUp.notes: Fallback: digital +12 semitone pitch shift and Mix.

Pedal_Octavius.name: Octavius
Pedal_Octavius.notes: Bundled Boss OC-2 style octave-down pedal based on the local Octavius schematic, using Rocksmith's Tone and Mix knobs.

Pedal_MultiPitch.name: MultiPitch
Pedal_MultiPitch.notes: Bundled MF-102 style ring mod pitch-sideband pedal based on the local multipitch schematic, using Rocksmith's Pitch1, Tone and Mix knobs.

Bass_Pedal_BassSubOctave.name: BassSubOctave
Bass_Pedal_BassSubOctave.notes: Bundled Boss OC-2 model — monophonic analog octaver: comparator + flip-flop frequency divider (one octave down), envelope-tracked, with a Tone low-pass and dry/sub Mix. Maps RS Mix/Tone.

Pedal_BitCruncher.name: BitCruncher
Pedal_BitCruncher.notes: Bundled Beverly BitCrusher/ADC0804-style lo-fi converter using Rocksmith's Attack, FilterType, Mix, Release, and Sens knobs.

Pedal_RingMod.name: RingMod
Pedal_RingMod.notes: Bundled Maestro/Oberheim RM-1A style ring modulator using Rocksmith's Depth, Waveform, Sensitivity and Attack knobs.

Pedal_RingMod.name: MRingModulator
Pedal_RingMod.notes: Frequency, Depth, Dry/Wet — Melda free (yes, the free bundle ships this; *MB variant is the paid one)

Pedal_Swole.name: Swole
Pedal_Swole.notes: Bundled heavy saturated compressor based on Rocksmith's description, using Rocksmith's Smash and Rate knobs.

Pedal_ShredZone.name: ShredZone
Pedal_ShredZone.notes: Bundled Boss MT-2 style high-gain distortion using Rocksmith Gain, Bass, Mid and Treble controls

Pedal_Enbiggenator.name: Enbiggenator
Pedal_Enbiggenator.notes: Bundled Rocksmith-style modulated thickener/widener using Rocksmith's Rate, Depth, and Mix knobs.

Pedal_Enbiggenator.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_Enbiggenator.notes: Low drive + soft type for 'embiggen' saturation

Rack_StereoPhaser.name: StereoPhaser
Rack_StereoPhaser.notes: Bundled Stereo phaser. Maps RS Rate/Depth/Mix.

Rack_StudioWahFilter.name: StudioWahFilter
Rack_StudioWahFilter.notes: Bundled Auto wah filter. Maps RS Sens/Attack/Release/Pedal/Auto.

Rack_SynthFilter.name: SynthFilter
Rack_SynthFilter.notes: Bundled Envelope filterbank. Maps RS Sens/Attack/Release/FilterType/Mix.

Rack_RotaVibe.name: RotaVibe
Rack_RotaVibe.notes: Bundled Rotary speaker. Maps RS Rate/Depth/Mix/Balance.

Rack_StereoTubeTrem.name: StereoTubeTrem
Rack_StereoTubeTrem.notes: Bundled Tube tremolo. Maps RS Speed/Mix/Waveform.

Rack_StudioPitch.name: StudioPitch
Rack_StudioPitch.notes: Bundled Pitch shifter. Maps RS Pitch/Tone/Mix/Pan.

Bass_Pedal_BassEnbig.name: BassEnbig
Bass_Pedal_BassEnbig.notes: Bundled 'Enbiggenator' — a fictional RS pedal modeled as an LFO-modulated resonant band-pass (sci-fi vibe/wobble). Maps RS Rate/Depth/Mix/Filter.

Pedal_SendInTheClones.name: SendInTheClones
Pedal_SendInTheClones.notes: Bundled Clone Theory style BBD chorus/doubler. Clones increases voice count/spread; Depth and Mix mirror Rocksmith.

Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.name: EdenWTDI
Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.notes: Bundled Eden WTDI model — preamp Gain drive + optical Compressor + 3-band active EQ (Bass/Mid/Treble ±15 dB) + Eden Enhance contour. The two red switches are LoShift (Bass Boost) and MidShift, modeled as toggles. Maps all 8 RS knobs.

Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.name: kHs Distortion
Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.notes: Low drive + clean type for DI saturation

Rack_StereoAnalogVibe.name: StereoAnalogVibe
Rack_StereoAnalogVibe.notes: Bundled Univibe vibrato. Maps RS Speed/Waveform/Mix.

Rack_StereoAnalogVibe.name: kHs Chorus
Rack_StereoAnalogVibe.notes: Stereo analog vibrato — kHs Chorus's modulated delay covers the wobble character

Rack_StudioChamber.name: StudioChamber
Rack_StudioChamber.notes: Bundled Freeverb-style StudioChamber. Maps RS Time/Tone/Depth/Mix.

Rack_StudioChamber.name: kHs Reverb
Rack_StudioChamber.notes: Chamber-style reverb mapped to generic kHs Reverb

Rack_StudioChorus.name: StudioChorus
Rack_StudioChorus.notes: Bundled Boss RCE-10 Chorus Ensemble model — stereo BBD chorus, two ensemble voices per channel, Lo/Hi wet filtering, Stereo spread. Maps all 7 RS knobs (Rate in Hz).

Rack_StudioChorus.name: kHs Chorus
Rack_StudioChorus.notes: Multi-knob studio chorus → kHs Chorus (LoFilter/HiFilter dropped, Delay→Delay, Stereo→Stereo)

Rack_StudioDelay.name: StudioDelay
Rack_StudioDelay.notes: Bundled stereo delay with independent L/R times + Feedback + repeat Filter. Maps RS TimeL/TimeR(ms)/Feedback/Filter/Mix.

Rack_StudioDelay.name: kHs Delay
Rack_StudioDelay.notes: Studio stereo delay → kHs Delay. RS TimeL/TimeR averaged into Time.

Rack_StudioFlanger.name: StudioFlanger
Rack_StudioFlanger.notes: Bundled stereo flanger — modulated short delay + Regen feedback + Tone low-pass. Maps RS Rate(Hz)/Depth/Regen/Tone/Mix.

Rack_StudioFlanger.name: kHs Flanger
Rack_StudioFlanger.notes: Studio flanger → kHs Flanger (Regen→Feedback, Tone dropped)

Rack_StudioPlate.name: StudioPlate
Rack_StudioPlate.notes: Bundled Freeverb-style StudioPlate. Maps RS Time/Tone/Depth/Mix.

Rack_StudioPlate.name: kHs Reverb
Rack_StudioPlate.notes: Plate reverb mapped to kHs Reverb (no dedicated plate algo in free)

Rack_StudioVerb.name: StudioVerb
Rack_StudioVerb.notes: Bundled Freeverb-style StudioVerb. Maps RS Time/Tone/Depth/Mix.

Rack_TapeEcho.name: TapeEcho
Rack_TapeEcho.notes: Bundled Roland RE-201 Space Echo model — stereo tape echo, dark saturated repeats with wow & flutter + cross-feed. Maps RS Time(ms)/Feedback/Filter/Stereo/Mix.

Rack_TapeEcho.name: kHs Delay
Rack_TapeEcho.notes: Tape echo → kHs Delay (no dedicated tape-saturation in free; the comp pre-stage covers some)

Amp_CA100.name: DualRect
Amp_CA100.notes: Bundled Mesa-Boogie Dual Rectifier Red-channel style amp based on the local Cali_100 schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, Treble, and Pres knobs.

Amp_CA38.name: MarkIV
Amp_CA38.notes: Bundled Mesa-Boogie Mark IV lead-channel style amp based on the local Mark IV schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, and Treble knobs.

Amp_CA85.name: MarkIII
Amp_CA85.notes: Bundled Mesa-Boogie Mark III R2 / crunch-mode style amp based on the local Mark III schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, and Treble knobs.

Amp_CS90.name: Ronald JC-90
Amp_CS90.notes: Bundled Roland JC-90 'Jazz Chorus' style SOLID-STATE amp (parody brand 'Ronald'), full front panel (Distortion, Volume, Hi-Treble/Treble/Middle/Bass, Reverb, Rate/Depth/Chorus stereo BBD chorus) modelled component-by-component from the local JC-90 schematic. Rocksmith's Gain knob drives the Distortion (clean at 0); Bass/Mid/Treble->tone stack, Pres->Hi-Treble. Reverb/Chorus off for songs.

Amp_EN30.name: EN30
Amp_EN30.notes: Bundled Vox AC30 Top Boost / EL84 style amp based on the local EN30 schematics, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, Treble, Pres, and Bright knobs.

Amp_GB100.name: Raney AOR50
Amp_GB100.notes: Bundled Laney AOR 50 'Pro Tube Lead' (A50 Series II) style amp (parody brand 'Raney'), full 2-channel front panel (Channel One + AOR lead, each Preamp/Master with Pull-Bright, shared Bass/Pull-Deep, Middle/Pull-Boost, Treble, Presence) modelled component-by-component from the local AOR50 schematic. Rocksmith's Gain knob drives the channel morph (Channel One clean -> AOR lead); Bass/Mid/Treble->tone stack, Pres->Presence.

Amp_MarshallDSL100H.name: Regis DSL100
Amp_MarshallDSL100H.notes: Bundled Marshall JCM2000 DSL100 style amp (parody brand 'Regis'), full 2-channel front panel (Classic Clean/Crunch + Ultra OD1/OD2, Tone Shift, Resonance, Presence, dual Master, per-channel reverb, Low/High output) modelled component-by-component from the local DSL100 schematics. Rocksmith's Gain knob drives the channel morph (clean->crunch->ultra); Bass/Mid/Treble->tone stack, Pres->Presence, Res->Resonance.

Amp_TW22.name: TW22
Amp_TW22.notes: Bundled Fender Super-Sonic 22 / 6V6 style amp based on the local TW22 schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, and Treble knobs.

Amp_TW26.name: TW26
Amp_TW26.notes: Bundled Fender 57 Deluxe / 5E3 tweed style amp based on the local TW26 schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, Treble, and Pres knobs.

Amp_TW40.name: Bender Bassman
Amp_TW40.notes: Bundled Fender Bassman 5F6-A tweed style amp (parody brand 'Bender'), full front panel (2 jumperable channels Bright/Normal with their own Volume, real FMV tone stack Treble/Bass/Middle, Presence, clickable input cable) modelled component-by-component from the local 5F6-A schematic. The 5F6-A has no gain knob, so Rocksmith's Gain drives the Bright Volume; Bass/Mid/Treble->tone stack, Pres->Presence.

Bass_Amp_BT880B.name: FreddyKrueger800BR
Bass_Amp_BT880B.notes: Bundled Gallien-Krueger 800RB style bass head (Rocksmith 'BT880B' = GK RB800) modeled from the 800RB service manual, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, and Treble knobs.

Bass_Amp_BT975B.name: SamplegSBTCL
Bass_Amp_BT975B.notes: Bundled Ampeg SVT-CL style all-tube bass head (Rocksmith 'BT975B'); preamp modeled from the documented SVT-CL circuit, using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, and Treble knobs.

Bass_Amp_CH300B.name: SharkeHB3500
Bass_Amp_CH300B.notes: Bundled Hartke HA3500 style bass head (assigned to Rocksmith 'CH300B'/'CLH-300B', which exposes Gain/Bass/Mid/Treble + Mid-Freq/Enhance): tube+solid-state preamp blend, compressor, 10-band graphic EQ, low/high-pass, master. Modeled from the HA3500 circuit diagram. RS Gain->Solid State; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->graphic-EQ 125/500/4k bands. (CS300B freed for a Fender Rumble.)

Bass_Amp_CH600B.name: SharkeHB5000
Bass_Amp_CH600B.notes: Bundled Hartke HA5000 style bass head (Rocksmith 'CH600B'): 2x250W bi-amp, tube+solid-state preamp blend, compressor, 10-band graphic EQ, contour low/high-pass, master. Modeled from the HA5000 circuit diagram (board 4005182801). RS Gain->Solid State; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->graphic-EQ 125/500/5k bands.

Bass_Amp_BT600B.name: PeeBeeTMinus
Bass_Amp_BT600B.notes: Bundled Peavey T-Max style two-channel bass head (Rocksmith 'BT600B'): component-level model from the T-Max preamp schematic (Peavey drawing 70985). 12AX7 tube channel (Tube Pre/Post) + solid-state channel (rail-clipping CLIP), Channel Select/Combine, Shelving Low/High, 7-band graphic EQ (40/100/250/625/1.6k/4k/10k), biamp Balance/X-Over, Master. RS Gain->Tube Pre; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->graphic-EQ 100/625/4k bands.

Bass_Amp_CS300B.name: BenderFumble800
Bass_Amp_CS300B.notes: Bundled Fender Rumble Bass style all-tube head (Rocksmith 'CS300B'): component-level model from the 1995 Fender Rumble Bass schematic (FMIC 048406/048411) — 12AX7 preamp + Fender passive Treble/Bass/Middle tone stack + Bright + 6x 6550WA push-pull (~300 W). RS Gain->Gain; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->tone stack.

Bass_Amp_EdenE300.name: AidenGT300
Bass_Amp_EdenE300.notes: Bundled Eden WT-300 'Traveler' Valve-Tech style hybrid bass preamp (Rocksmith 'EdenE300'): component-level model from the Eden WT-300 preamp schematic (2-19-93) — 12AX7 input, Eden opto Comp, Enhance contour, Bass/Treble shelves, 3-band semi-parametric EQ (30-300/200-2k/1.2-12k), Master. RS Gain->Gain; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->Bass/EQ2 mid/Treble.

Bass_Amp_EdenWT550.name: AidenGT550
Bass_Amp_EdenWT550.notes: Bundled Eden WT-550 'Traveler 550' Valve-Tech style hybrid bass preamp (Rocksmith 'EdenWT550'): same Valve-Tech Twin-Triode preamp as the WT-300 in the 550 W head, modeled from the WT-550 preamp schematic (WT550PreEQ). 12AX7 input, Eden Comp, Enhance, Bass/Treble shelves, 3-band semi-parametric EQ (Low/Mid/High), Master. RS Gain->Gain; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->Bass/EQ2 mid/Treble.

Bass_Amp_EdenWt800.name: AidenGT880
Bass_Amp_EdenWt800.notes: Bundled Eden WT-880 'World Tour' Valve-Tech style hybrid bass head (Rocksmith 'EdenWt800'): component-level model from the Eden WT-800C schematic. Same Eden preamp as the WT-300/550 (12AX7 input, Comp, Enhance, Bass/Treble shelves, 3-band semi-parametric Low/Mid/High EQ) plus the WT-880 bi-amp (Crossover Freq + Balance + X-Over on/off), Master. RS Gain->Gain; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->Bass/Mid Level/Treble.

Bass_Amp_HT100B.name: Lovolt100
Bass_Amp_HT100B.notes: Bundled Custom Hiwatt 100 (DR103) style all-tube head (Rocksmith 'HT100B'): component-level model from the documented DR103 circuit + factory spec — 12AX7 Normal/Bright preamp, British (FMV) Bass/Middle/Treble tone stack, Presence (NFB), 4x EL34 push-pull (~100 W, big clean Hiwatt headroom). RS Gain->Normal Vol; RS Bass/Mid/Treble->tone stack.

Bass_Amp_CS75B.name: SamplegV4B
Bass_Amp_CS75B.notes: Bundled Ampeg V-4B style all-tube bass head (Rocksmith 'CS75B'); component-level model from the 1971 V-4B schematic (12AX7 preamp, 4x 7027A ~100W), using Rocksmith's Gain, Bass, Mid, and Treble knobs.

Bass_Amp_CH350B.name: MarstenDBS7400
Bass_Amp_CH350B.notes: Bundled Marshall DBS 7400 (Dynamic Bass System) style solid-state bass head (Rocksmith 'CS350B'/'CLH-350B'); component-level model from the 7400 schematic (op-amp preamp + Lo/Hi Primary EQ + Depth-only compressor + the real 9-band gyrator graphic EQ 50/80/160/320/640/1.25k/2.5k/5k/8k). Uses RS Gain, Bass->Lo, Treble->Hi; RS's 7 graphic bands are remapped to the nearest of the 9.
